calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, And Application For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Expenses, And Class Representative'S Individual Settlement And Enhancement
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TROY STERMER'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, AND APPLICATION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND EXPENSES, AND CLASS REPRESENTATIVE'S INDIVIDUAL SETTLEMENT AND ENHANCEMENT

Appearances:
Eric Grover of Keller Grover (543.1305) for plaintiff and moving party
Robert Tollen of Seyfarth Shaw (397.2823) for defendant Ulta Salon, Cosemtics and Fragrance, Inc.

No other appearances on this matter. The Court directed Mr. Tollen to make a formal appearance on behalf of defendant Ulta, and adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the settlement is approved based on the Notice to the Class that defines the scope of the settlement. Plaintiff's submission demonstrates that the settlement, the distribution and the award of attorneys' fees and costs in reasonable. Order and judgment signed in open Court. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Continued To Sep-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Joint Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Appendix
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TROY STERMER'S JOINT MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT.
APPEARANCES: ERIC A. GROVER, ESQUIRE (KELLER GROVER, 415.543.1305) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ROBERT W. TOLLEN, ESQUIRE (SEYFARTH SHAW, 415.397.2823) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING; PRELIMINARY APPROVAL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO FILE A NOTICE OF MOTION WHEN SETTING FUTURE DATES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
